package.name: chess_arm_interfaces
package.description: Canonical ROS 2 message and service definitions for the 6-DOF chess-playing robot arm. Defines the contract shared across the brain (engine + move resolution + piece-action planning), the vision node (changed-square detection), and the orchestrator. The chess engine is the authoritative game state; vision only reports changed squares; moves are resolved by matching changed squares to python-chess legal moves. Phase 0 of the chess-robot build (ROS 2 Lyrical Luth).
